SYNTAX::PART_OF_SPEECH.name: Grammatical Role
SYNTAX::PART_OF_SPEECH.description: Part-of-speech marker. Positive = Noun, Negative = Verb. Determines how syntactic parsing layers treat this token.

DOMAIN::SECURITY.name: Computer Security
DOMAIN::SECURITY.description: Tracks memory vulnerabilities, buffer overflows, and active malicious states like shellcode execution.

DOMAIN::COOKING.name: Cooking and Culinary Science
DOMAIN::COOKING.description: Tracks recipe ingredient stress, temperature spikes, pH balance, and structural integrity of foods.

DOMAIN::CAR_CLEANING.name: Car Cleaning and Surface Care
DOMAIN::CAR_CLEANING.description: Tracks paint finish condition, surfactant density, chemical abrasiveness, clearcoat levels, and micro-scratch wear.

DOMAIN::MECHANICAL.name: Mechanical Engineering
DOMAIN::MECHANICAL.description: Tracks physical mechanical systems, gear ratios, torque, friction, and kinetic forces.

SYS::ENTROPY.name: System Entropy and Resilience
SYS::ENTROPY.description: Universal health metric. 1.0 = perfect structural integrity. -1.0 = catastrophic failure or collapse.

SYS::CONFIDENCE.name: Epistemic Confidence
SYS::CONFIDENCE.description: Real-time reasoning confidence score. Decays when activations are built on conflicting or volatile state.

META::PROVENANCE.name: Rule Provenance ID
META::PROVENANCE.description: Integer register. Every time a SERG rule activates, it writes its own rule_id here. Provides full diagnostic traceability.

META::EVIDENCE.name: Evidence Source Trace
META::EVIDENCE.description: Enum register tracking whether state is from direct input (0), static facts (1), or logical inference (2).

SYS::CONFLICT.name: System Conflict Monitor
SYS::CONFLICT.description: Spiked by audit rules when a logical contradiction is detected. Monitored by the CCE halting condition.

DOMAIN::HISTORY_CANADA.name: History of Canada
DOMAIN::HISTORY_CANADA.description: Tracks historical events, figures, and concepts related to Canadian history.

SYNTAX::NOUN.name: Noun Marker
SYNTAX::NOUN.description: Syntactic role for physical or abstract entities.

SYNTAX::VERB.name: Verb Marker
SYNTAX::VERB.description: Syntactic role for actions or states.

SYNTAX::SUBJECT.name: Subject Role
SYNTAX::SUBJECT.description: The active agent of the sentence.

SYNTAX::IS_QUESTION.name: Interrogative Marker
SYNTAX::IS_QUESTION.description: Flag for open questions requiring answers.

SEMANTIC::IS_PERSON.name: Semantic Person/Agent
SEMANTIC::IS_PERSON.description: Flag for human beings, historic figures, or entities.

SEMANTIC::IS_PLACE.name: Semantic Place/Location
SEMANTIC::IS_PLACE.description: Flag for geographical entities, cities, countries, or regions.

SEMANTIC::IS_THING.name: Semantic Thing/Object
SEMANTIC::IS_THING.description: Flag for physical objects, materials, or artifacts.

SEMANTIC::IS_TIME.name: Semantic Time/Era
SEMANTIC::IS_TIME.description: Flag for temporal markers, eras, or specific years.

SEMANTIC::IS_ACTION.name: Semantic Action/Event
SEMANTIC::IS_ACTION.description: Flag for active events, procedures, or verbs.

SEMANTIC::IS_QUALITY.name: Semantic Quality/Trait
SEMANTIC::IS_QUALITY.description: Flag for qualitative characteristics, superlatives, or constraints.

SEMANTIC::IS_ORGANIC.name: Semantic Organic/Biotic
SEMANTIC::IS_ORGANIC.description: Flag for biotic matter, food, or natural substances.

SEMANTIC::IS_INORGANIC.name: Semantic Inorganic/Synthetic
SEMANTIC::IS_INORGANIC.description: Flag for mechanical components, machinery, synthetic items, or cleanroom assets.

SYNTAX::ADJECTIVE.name: Adjective Part of Speech
SYNTAX::ADJECTIVE.description: Part of speech flag for adjectives/modifiers.

SYNTAX::ADVERB.name: Adverb Part of Speech
SYNTAX::ADVERB.description: Part of speech flag for adverbs.

SYNTAX::PRONOUN.name: Pronoun Part of Speech
SYNTAX::PRONOUN.description: Part of speech flag for pronouns.

SYNTAX::PREPOSITION.name: Preposition Part of Speech
SYNTAX::PREPOSITION.description: Part of speech flag for prepositions/connectives.

SYNTAX::CONJUNCTION.name: Conjunction Part of Speech
SYNTAX::CONJUNCTION.description: Part of speech flag for conjunctions.

SYNTAX::DETERMINER.name: Determiner Part of Speech
SYNTAX::DETERMINER.description: Part of speech flag for determiners.

SYNTAX::NUMBER.name: Numeric value/number
SYNTAX::NUMBER.description: Flag for numeric values, years, or temperatures.

CONCEPT::PATIENT.name: Patient role
CONCEPT::PATIENT.description: Conceptual patient affected by an action.

CONCEPT::INSTRUMENT.name: Instrument role
CONCEPT::INSTRUMENT.description: Conceptual instrument/tool used in an action.

FACT::FOUNDING_1867.name: 1867 FACT Anchor
FACT::FOUNDING_1867.description: Factual knowledge anchor for the year 1867.

FACT::PERSON_MACDONALD.name: Macdonald FACT Anchor
FACT::PERSON_MACDONALD.description: Factual knowledge anchor for John A. Macdonald.

FACT::LEADER_PM.name: Prime Minister FACT Anchor
FACT::LEADER_PM.description: Factual knowledge anchor for Prime Ministers.

FACT::SYMBOL_MAPLE.name: Maple Leaf FACT Anchor
FACT::SYMBOL_MAPLE.description: Factual knowledge anchor for the Maple Leaf.

FACT::DOUGH_YEAST.name: Yeast Knowledge Anchor
FACT::DOUGH_YEAST.description: Material knowledge for yeast and fermentation.

FACT::PROTECT_WAX.name: Carnauba Wax Knowledge Anchor
FACT::PROTECT_WAX.description: Coating knowledge for protective carnauba wax.

DOMAIN::POLITICAL_SCIENCE.name: Political Science Domain
DOMAIN::POLITICAL_SCIENCE.description: Governance structures, political offices, and states.

DOMAIN::TEXTILES.name: Textiles Domain
DOMAIN::TEXTILES.description: Fabric types, microfiber structure, leather properties.

SYNTAX::GERUND.name: Gerund Verb form
SYNTAX::GERUND.description: Verb form ending in -ing acting as noun.

SYNTAX::PARTICIPLE.name: Participle Verb form
SYNTAX::PARTICIPLE.description: Verb form ending in -ed acting as modifier.

SYNTAX::INFINITIVE.name: Infinitive Verb form
SYNTAX::INFINITIVE.description: Base form of verb prefixed with 'to'.

SYNTAX::POSITION_INDEX.name: Word Position Index
SYNTAX::POSITION_INDEX.description: Absolute index of the token in the input sequence.

SYNTAX::POSITION_REL.name: Relative Position Tracker
SYNTAX::POSITION_REL.description: Tracker for relative distance filter query constraints.

SEMANTIC::IS_MATERIAL.name: Semantic Material
SEMANTIC::IS_MATERIAL.description: Flag for surface materials, fabrics, or textiles.

SEMANTIC::IS_FOOD.name: Semantic Food
SEMANTIC::IS_FOOD.description: Flag for food, recipes, or ingredients.
